name: smart-campus-mini
rfp_text:
[Page 1]
Mandatory Requirements

The proposed solution must support role-based access control for administrators, reception staff, and security officers.
The vendor shall provide an audit trail for all visitor check-in and check-out events.
The system must generate daily and monthly security activity reports.
The solution must support exporting reports in CSV format.
The vendor must provide implementation within 8 weeks of contract award.
The bidder shall include onboarding and training for up to 25 staff members.
The proposal must describe the vendor's data retention policy and backup procedures.
The solution should provide optional SMS or email notifications for host alerts.
proposal_text:
Access and user controls

The system includes role-based permissions for administrators, front-desk staff, and security team members.

Auditability and reporting

Every visitor event is recorded with timestamped audit history. Standard dashboards include daily operational summaries and monthly activity reporting. Reports can be exported to CSV for compliance and internal review.

Implementation and onboarding

We propose an implementation timeline of 6 weeks from kickoff. The engagement includes onboarding workshops and administrator training for up to 25 staff members.

Data management

Our standard deployment includes nightly backups and a configurable data retention policy documented during implementation.

Notifications

The platform includes optional email host notifications.

name: lab-rfq-mini
rfp_text:
[Page 1]
Submission Requirements

The quotation must include a delivery timeline, pricing summary, and country of origin.
The supplier shall provide a certificate of analysis for each batch.
The bidder must confirm cold-chain handling for temperature-sensitive materials.
The response should include warranty and replacement terms.
proposal_text:
Delivery and commercial terms

Our quotation includes a delivery timeline, pricing summary, and country of origin for each material.

Quality assurance

A certificate of analysis is supplied with every batch shipment.

Handling

We confirm cold-chain handling for all temperature-sensitive materials during storage and transport.
